#ZONE DATA = 1

	#ZONE NUMBER = 0
		#NAME = UNSET
		#X POS = 0
		#Y POS = 0
		#WIDTH = 256
		#HEIGHT = 26
		#ID TYPE = GAME_ROOM_ZONE
		#UID = 0

#END OF ZONE DATA

#SPAWN POINT DATA = 14
	#SPAWN POINT NUMBER = 0
	#UNIQUE IDENTIFIER NUMBER = 23
	#PARENT UID = -1
	#NEXT SIBLING UID = -1
		#NAME = NORMAL_ENEMY_WAVE_01
		#SCRIPT = RANDOM_ENEMY_WAVE_SELECTION
		#X POS = 2664
		#Y POS = 64
		#ID TYPE = C64_MAIN_LEVEL_ENEMY
		#PARAMETERS = 1
			#PARAMETER PASSED_PARAM_1=CONSTANT:POSITION_7_TMB_VALID_BITFLAG

	#SPAWN POINT NUMBER = 1
	#UNIQUE IDENTIFIER NUMBER = 24
	#PARENT UID = -1
	#NEXT SIBLING UID = -1
		#NAME = NORMAL_ENEMY_WAVE_000
		#SCRIPT = RANDOM_ENEMY_WAVE_SELECTION
		#X POS = 3064
		#Y POS = 64
		#ID TYPE = C64_MAIN_LEVEL_ENEMY
		#PARAMETERS = 1
			#PARAMETER PASSED_PARAM_1=CONSTANT:POSITION_7_TMB_VALID_BITFLAG

	#SPAWN POINT NUMBER = 2
	#UNIQUE IDENTIFIER NUMBER = 25
	#PARENT UID = -1
	#NEXT SIBLING UID = -1
		#NAME = NORMAL_ENEMY_WAVE_001
		#SCRIPT = RANDOM_ENEMY_WAVE_SELECTION
		#X POS = 2296
		#Y POS = 80
		#ID TYPE = C64_MAIN_LEVEL_ENEMY
		#PARAMETERS = 1
			#PARAMETER PASSED_PARAM_1=CONSTANT:POSITION_3_TM_VALID_BITFLAG

	#SPAWN POINT NUMBER = 3
	#UNIQUE IDENTIFIER NUMBER = 26
	#PARENT UID = -1
	#NEXT SIBLING UID = -1
		#NAME = NORMAL_ENEMY_WAVE_002
		#SCRIPT = RANDOM_ENEMY_WAVE_SELECTION
		#X POS = 1344
		#Y POS = 64
		#ID TYPE = C64_MAIN_LEVEL_ENEMY
		#PARAMETERS = 1
			#PARAMETER PASSED_PARAM_1=CONSTANT:POSITION_7_TMB_VALID_BITFLAG

	#SPAWN POINT NUMBER = 4
	#UNIQUE IDENTIFIER NUMBER = 27
	#PARENT UID = -1
	#NEXT SIBLING UID = -1
		#NAME = NORMAL_ENEMY_WAVE_003
		#SCRIPT = RANDOM_ENEMY_WAVE_SELECTION
		#X POS = 752
		#Y POS = 80
		#ID TYPE = C64_MAIN_LEVEL_ENEMY
		#PARAMETERS = 1
			#PARAMETER PASSED_PARAM_1=CONSTANT:POSITION_3_TM_VALID_BITFLAG

	#SPAWN POINT NUMBER = 5
	#UNIQUE IDENTIFIER NUMBER = 28
	#PARENT UID = -1
	#NEXT SIBLING UID = -1
		#NAME = NORMAL_ENEMY_WAVE_004
		#SCRIPT = RANDOM_ENEMY_WAVE_SELECTION
		#X POS = 1952
		#Y POS = 64
		#ID TYPE = C64_MAIN_LEVEL_ENEMY
		#PARAMETERS = 1
			#PARAMETER PASSED_PARAM_1=CONSTANT:POSITION_3_TM_VALID_BITFLAG

	#SPAWN POINT NUMBER = 6
	#UNIQUE IDENTIFIER NUMBER = 30
	#PARENT UID = -1
	#NEXT SIBLING UID = -1
		#NAME = WARP_003
		#SCRIPT = WARP_ZONE_UP
		#X POS = 1064
		#Y POS = 360
		#ID TYPE = WARP_ZONES
		#PARAMETERS = 0

	#SPAWN POINT NUMBER = 7
	#UNIQUE IDENTIFIER NUMBER = 32
	#PARENT UID = -1
	#NEXT SIBLING UID = -1
		#NAME = WARP_000
		#SCRIPT = WARP_ZONE_DOWN
		#X POS = 3592
		#Y POS = 360
		#ID TYPE = WARP_ZONES
		#PARAMETERS = 0

	#SPAWN POINT NUMBER = 8
	#UNIQUE IDENTIFIER NUMBER = 0
	#PARENT UID = 27
	#NEXT SIBLING UID = -1
		#NAME = NORMAL_ENEMY_WAVE_005
		#SCRIPT = RANDOM_ENEMY_WAVE_SELECTION_DUMMY
		#X POS = 1000
		#Y POS = 216
		#ID TYPE = C64_MAIN_LEVEL_ENEMY
		#PARAMETERS = 1
			#PARAMETER PASSED_PARAM_1=CONSTANT:POSITION_3_TM_VALID_BITFLAG

	#SPAWN POINT NUMBER = 9
	#UNIQUE IDENTIFIER NUMBER = 1
	#PARENT UID = 26
	#NEXT SIBLING UID = -1
		#NAME = NORMAL_ENEMY_WAVE_006
		#SCRIPT = RANDOM_ENEMY_WAVE_SELECTION_DUMMY
		#X POS = 1648
		#Y POS = 248
		#ID TYPE = C64_MAIN_LEVEL_ENEMY
		#PARAMETERS = 1
			#PARAMETER PASSED_PARAM_1=CONSTANT:POSITION_7_TMB_VALID_BITFLAG

	#SPAWN POINT NUMBER = 10
	#UNIQUE IDENTIFIER NUMBER = 2
	#PARENT UID = 28
	#NEXT SIBLING UID = -1
